title: Printed Publications Act, 1947

sections.title: 3. Imprint on books printed and published in Zambia
sections.body:
Everybookprinted and published in Zambia shall bear an imprint in legible type showing—
Everybookprinted and published in Zambia shall bear an imprint in legible type showing—
(a)the full and correct name of the printer and the place where thebookwas printed;
the full and correct name of the printer and the place where thebookwas printed;
the full and correct name of the printer and the place where thebookwas printed;
(b)the full and correct name of the publisher and his place of business; and
the full and correct name of the publisher and his place of business; and
the full and correct name of the publisher and his place of business; and
(c)the year of publication.
the year of publication.
the year of publication.

sections.title: 4. Delivery of books published in Zambia to theDirector
sections.body:
The publisher of everybookpublished in Zambia shall, within two months of the publication, deliver at his own expense a copy of thebookto theDirectorat Lusaka, who shall give a written receipt for every copy received by him.
The publisher of everybookpublished in Zambia shall, within two months of the publication, deliver at his own expense a copy of thebookto theDirectorat Lusaka, who shall give a written receipt for every copy received by him.

sections.title: 5. Registration of newspapers
sections.body:
No person shall print or publish, or cause to be printed or published, anynewspaperuntil there has been registered at the office of theDirectorat Lusaka the full and correct title thereof and the full and correct names and places of abode of every person who is or is intended to be the proprietor,editor, printer or publisher of suchnewspaper, and the description of the premises where the same is to be published. Every alteration in such particulars shall forthwith be registered in like manner.
No person shall print or publish, or cause to be printed or published, anynewspaperuntil there has been registered at the office of theDirectorat Lusaka the full and correct title thereof and the full and correct names and places of abode of every person who is or is intended to be the proprietor,editor, printer or publisher of suchnewspaper, and the description of the premises where the same is to be published. Every alteration in such particulars shall forthwith be registered in like manner.

sections.title: 6. Certified extracts from register to be received in evidence
sections.body:
It shall be the duty of theDirectorto keep a register in which shall be entered the particulars mentioned in the last preceding section.
It shall be the duty of theDirectorto keep a register in which shall be entered the particulars mentioned in the last preceding section.
